ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "imdb_title_id" TEXT /* IMDB title ID of the movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "original_title" TEXT /* Original title of the movie */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the movie was released */,
  "date_published" TEXT /* Date the movie was published */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the movie in minutes */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the movie */,
  "production_company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production company */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the movie was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the movie was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_production_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_company_id") REFERENCES production_companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the director */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the director was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the director was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "writers" (
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each writer */,
  "writer_name" TEXT /* Name of the writer */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the writer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the writer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the writer was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("writer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Name of the actor */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the actor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the actor was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the actor was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the company */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the company was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the company was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the genre was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the genre was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the country */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the country was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the country was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the language */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the language was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the language was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review given by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_versions_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the movie-genre relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the movie-genre relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_countries" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the movie-country relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the movie-country relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_languages" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the language */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the movie-language relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the movie-language relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_directors" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the movie-director relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the movie-director relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_writers" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the writer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the movie-writer relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the movie-writer relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "writer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_actors" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the movie-actor relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the movie-actor relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "actor_id")
)
